title: Ember Electricity Demand Monthly API
description:
Get electricity demand data at a monthly grain.
    e.g.

`https://api.ember-energy.org/v1/electricity-demand/monthly?entity_code=BRA,DEU,ZAF&start_date=2020-01&end_date=2020-12&api_key=MY_API_KEY`
    

The methodology of this dataset can be found on its [dataset page](https://ember-energy.org/data/monthly-electricity-data/)
    within the 'Methodology - Ember Electricity Data' pdf.
